name: NCT
description:
NCT is a multinational group formed by SM Entertainment in 2016, currently consisting of 25 members. NCT has 4 subunits: NCT 127, NCT DREAM, WayV and NCT WISH

The members are:

  1. Taeyong

    • Leader of NCT, part of NCT U and NCT 127.

    • Age: 31 (born July 1, 1995).

  2. Johnny

    • Member of NCT U and NCT 127.

    • Age: 30 (born February 9, 1995).

  3. Yuta

    • Member of NCT U and NCT 127.

    • Age: 30 (born October 26, 1995).

  4. Kun

    • Leader of WayV and part of NCT U.

    • Age: 30 (born January 1, 1996).

  5. Doyoung

    • Member of NCT U and NCT 127.

    • Age: 29 (born February 1, 1996).

  6. Ten

    • Member of WayV and NCT U.

    • Age: 29 (born February 27, 1996).

  7. Jaehyun

    • Member of NCT U and NCT 127.

    • Age: 28 (born February 14, 1997).

  8. Winwin

    • Member of WayV and NCT U.

    • Age: 28 (born October 28, 1997).

  9. Jungwoo

    • Member of NCT U and NCT 127.

    • Age: 27 (born February 19, 1998).

  10. Mark

    • Member of NCT U, NCT 127, and NCT Dream.

    • Age: 26 (born August 2, 1999).

  11. Xiaojun

    • Member of WayV and NCT U.

    • Age: 26 (born August 8, 1999).

  12. Hendery

    • Member of WayV and NCT U.

    • Age: 26 (born September 28, 1999).

  13. Renjun

    • Member of NCT U and NCT Dream.

    • Age: 25 (born March 23, 2000).

  14. Jeno

    • Member of NCT U and NCT Dream.

    • Age: 25 (born April 23, 2000).

  15. Haechan

    • Member of NCT U, NCT 127, and NCT Dream.

    • Age: 25 (born June 6, 2000).

  16. Jaemin

    • Member of NCT U and NCT Dream.

    • Age: 25 (born August 13, 2000).

  17. Yangyang

    • Member of WayV and NCT U.

    • Age: 25 (born October 10, 2000).

  18. Jisung

  • Member of NCT Dream.

  • Age: 24 (born February 5, 2002

      • Member of NCT Dream.

      • Age: 24 (born November 22, 2001).

    2. Sion

      • Member of NCT U and NCT WISH.

      • Age: 23 (born October 14, 2002).
